name: plantuml-architect
description: Create and render PlantUML/UML architecture diagrams before coding web applications.

interface.shortDescription: Design web architecture and UML with PlantUML before coding.
interface.longDescription: PlantUML Architect gives Codex a diagram-as-code workflow for UML use case, sequence, class, activity, component, and deployment diagrams. It recognizes English and Vietnamese diagram requests such as PlantUML, UML, vẽ UML, sơ đồ use case, sơ đồ lớp, and thiết kế kiến trúc. It creates PlantUML files under docs/architecture and renders them to SVG through the local PlantUML CLI.
interface.defaultPrompt: Design the architecture first with PlantUML diagrams, then implement the web application.
